{{Quote|What do you want? I don't waste time with fans, so if this is about an autoprint, forget it. You can buy one when I get more made up.|Cassandra to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Casandra Mateil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Color/Legends|yellow-skinned]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who worked as a professional [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[3956 BBY]], [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] met her in [[Ahto City]]. Mateil was often considered to be somewhat egotistical; she would refuse to sign personal [[autoprint]]s, instead the autoprints would be created, and fans had to pay for them. She held second place at the [[Ahto City swoop track]] until Revan helped [[Queedle Molto]] enhance his [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] to become Sector Champion. Mateil's time fell to third place, and [[Hukta Jax]] was moved to second. Mateil was bumped down to fourth place once Revan became Sector Champion.

{{Char-stub}}
